STRL.headline: Sterling Infrastructure Stock Hits 52-Week High - Here's Why
STRL.description: Sterling Infrastructure (NASDAQ: STRL) reported strong Q1 2026 results with revenue of $825.7 million (up 92% YoY) and adjusted EPS of $3.59, significantly exceeding analyst expectations. The company raised its full-year 2026 guidance to $18.40-$19.05 EPS and $3.7-$3.8 billion revenue. The CEC acquisition contributed substantially to growth, and backlog reached $5.15 billion. Shares surged 29.46% in premarket trading to a new 52-week high.

POET.headline: POET Technologies Stock Climbs As Oil Slides And Ceasefire Holds
POET.description: POET Technologies shares surged 31.08% on Tuesday as semiconductor stocks rallied broadly. The gains were driven by easing geopolitical tensions following reassurances about the Iran ceasefire, which caused oil prices to drop significantly. Additionally, semiconductor stocks benefited from reports of U.S. efforts to address global memory chip shortages through the Pax Silica initiative, a supply-chain coalition with allied nations.

POET.headline: Is Poet Technologies a Millionaire-Maker Stock?
POET.description: Poet Technologies, a small-cap AI infrastructure company focused on photonic semiconductor technology, shows potential for disruptive innovation but faces significant risks. The company lost a major $5 million contract from Marvell Technology's Celestial AI subsidiary in late April, raising concerns about commercial viability. While 2025 revenue surged 2,500% to $1.07 million, this growth stems from a tiny base and the company faces mounting operating losses ($42.1 million in 2025). Analysts rec

CIFR.headline: Why Cipher Digital Stock Is Skyrocketing Today
CIFR.description: Cipher Digital stock surged 23.59% despite missing Q1 earnings and sales expectations. The company reported a loss of $0.28 per share on $34.84 million in sales, with revenue down 29% year-over-year. However, investors responded positively to the announcement of a new $200 million revolving credit facility, which will support the company's strategic pivot from cryptocurrency mining to AI infrastructure technologies.

CIFR.headline: Cipher Digital (CIFR) Rises On AI Data Center Momentum
CIFR.description: Cipher Digital shares rose 8.44% following Q1 FY2026 results, driven by strong AI data center momentum. The company signed its third hyperscale tenant lease, secured a $200 million credit facility, and reported 907 MW of operating capacity with a 3.3 GW pipeline. However, the company posted a net loss of 28 cents per share and missed revenue expectations of $36.01 million with $34.84 million reported.

SNDK.headline: 1 Update Amazon CEO Andy Jassy Just Said That Every Artificial Intelligence (AI) Investor Should Hear
SNDK.description: Amazon reported strong Q1 results with 17% sales growth and 30% operating income increase. AWS accelerated growth to 28% YoY, driven by AI demand. CEO Jassy emphasized the company's $200 billion 2026 capex investment in infrastructure (land, power, buildings, chips, servers) is essential for AI expansion, typically monetized 6-24 months after spending. The article highlights investment opportunities in AI supply chain companies providing critical components to hyperscalers.

SNDK.headline: Why Micron Stock Just Popped Again
SNDK.description: Micron Technology stock surged 11% after announcing the Micron 6600 ION SSD, a 245-terabyte solid-state drive designed for AI data centers. The new drive offers significant energy efficiency advantages over traditional hard disk drives, with claims of 84x better energy efficiency and 8.6x faster AI preprocessing. Micron's valuation at 27x earnings appears more attractive compared to competitor Sandisk at 43x earnings.

SNDK.headline: SanDisk Stock Crushes Nvidia With 45x Returns, Becomes S&P 500's Best
SNDK.description: SanDisk (SNDK) has emerged as the S&P 500's best performer in 2026, up 426% year-to-date, significantly outpacing Nvidia's 6.4% gain. The stock surged 81% in April alone, delivering 45 times the returns of Nvidia. Investors are rotating toward memory and storage plays as the purest way to capitalize on AI-driven storage shortages and NAND pricing increases, while Nvidia remains the dominant AI compute leader.

SNDK.headline: Why Sandisk Stock Keeps Going Up
SNDK.description: SanDisk stock surged following strong Q3 2026 earnings that beat Wall Street expectations with $23.03 per share in GAAP profit and $6 billion in sales. Two major analysts raised price targets—Fox Advisors to $1,500 and Bernstein to $1,700 per share—citing strong NAND flash memory pricing and robust demand. The stock is up for its fourth consecutive day, though analysts acknowledge the semiconductor cycle will eventually turn.

TEAM.headline: Valiantys Named Atlassian Partner of the Year 2026 - Strategy Solutions & Services Delivery APAC
TEAM.description: Atlassian announced that Valiantys and its subsidiary Glintech have won the Partner of the Year 2026 Awards in Strategy Solutions and Services Delivery for APAC (fourth consecutive year). The recognition highlights Valiantys' exceptional performance in new business development, thought leadership, and delivery of complementary products and services. Valiantys was also named a finalist in six additional award categories.

TEAM.headline: Stock Market Today: Oil Jumps 5%, S&P 500 Drops As Iran Strikes UAE Port
TEAM.description: U.S. stocks fell Monday as an Iranian drone strike on a UAE oil facility sent Brent crude above $114 a barrel, raising inflation concerns and expectations of a potential Fed rate hike by March 2027. The S&P 500 dropped 0.5%, the Dow fell 1.0%, and the Nasdaq 100 declined 0.7%. Energy stocks rallied while transportation, logistics, and rate-sensitive sectors suffered significant losses. Defense stocks gained on Pentagon spending narratives, while software and crypto-related equities found strengt

SOUN.headline: SoundHound AI Launches Self-Learning Agentic AI Platform OASYS
SOUN.description: SoundHound AI (NASDAQ: SOUN) announced the launch of OASYS, a self-learning agentic AI platform that enables multilingual AI agents to autonomously build, learn, and improve themselves. The platform can create functioning agents in minutes, automatically ingest documentation, and deploy across multiple channels including phones, web chats, kiosks, and in-vehicle systems. The company expects Q1 2025 revenue of $42.59 million and has beaten analyst estimates in 7 of the past 8 quarters.

CRCL.headline: Circle Stock Soars As Bitcoin Nears $80,000 Three-Month High
CRCL.description: Circle Internet Group shares jumped 16% following Bitcoin's push toward $80,000 and a compromise on the CLARITY Act that preserves stablecoin reward programs. Other crypto-linked stocks also rallied, with Coinbase gaining 7%, BitGo rising 12%, and Galaxy Digital climbing 5%. Technically, Circle remains in 'repair mode' with mixed moving average signals despite the near-term bullish momentum.

CRCL.headline: Stock Market Today: Oil Jumps 5%, S&P 500 Drops As Iran Strikes UAE Port
CRCL.description: U.S. stocks fell Monday as an Iranian drone strike on a UAE oil facility sent Brent crude above $114 a barrel, raising inflation concerns and expectations of a potential Fed rate hike by March 2027. The S&P 500 dropped 0.5%, the Dow fell 1.0%, and the Nasdaq 100 declined 0.7%. Energy stocks rallied while transportation, logistics, and rate-sensitive sectors suffered significant losses.
